stories.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
stories.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

stories.title: Aerial footage reveals destruction in coastal Venezuela
stories.summary: Multi-storey buildings have collapsed in La Guaira following two major earthquakes on Wednesday.

stories.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
stories.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.

stories.title: Christmas market attacker jailed for life for murdering six in Germany
stories.summary: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.

stories.title: Senior Ukrainian intelligence official jailed for life for spying for Russia
stories.summary: Col Dmytro Kozyura agreed to share state secrets and systematically disclosed classified information, prosecutors say.

stories.title: Reflecting Pool liner cut with sharp knife or razor, National Park Service says
stories.summary: Earlier in the week Donald Trump blamed vandals for "a 300 foot long gash" in the pool and accused someone of putting fertiliser in the water.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Shipping rebounds in Strait of Hormuz one week after U.S.-Iran deal – but fragile confidence threatens recovery
stories.summary: Shipping traffic through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz is recovering one week after the U.S. and Iran signed an interim peace deal.

stories.title: UN agency pauses Hormuz ship evacuation plan after first vessel attack under peace deal
stories.summary: The pause follows a container ship being struck near the coast of Oman on Thursday, with a U.S. official saying that Iran was responsible for the attack.

stories.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
stories.summary: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.

stories.title: Trump pledges rapid U.S. response for Venezuela after historic earthquakes kill hundreds
stories.summary: The swift U.S. offer of assistance reflects a degree of diplomatic realignment between the Trump administration and the Venezuelan interim government.

stories.title: Iran warns ships it's 'unacceptable and dangerous' to transit the Strait of Hormuz without their approval
stories.summary: The stern warning underscores Tehran's resolve to retain control over the Strait of Hormuz and to resist transits that bypass its authorization.

stories.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
stories.summary: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

stories.title: SpaceX plans to launch Starlink mobile service in the US
stories.summary: Move would test whether group can turn ambition into a mass-market phone business.

stories.title: Rocket Report: China may soon attempt booster landing; Rocket Lab does rapid response

stories.title: Microsoft adds another year to Windows 10 extended update program
stories.summary: About a quarter of PCs are still running Microsoft's previous operating system.

stories.title: FCC may kill $2B program that connects schools and libraries to Internet
stories.summary: Carr cites screen time concerns, is accused of trying to be "the nation’s parent."

stories.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
stories.summary: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."

stories.title: Google finally releases a Finance Android app, promises iOS version later in 2026
stories.summary: It took 20 years, but the Finance app arrives just in time to be packed full of AI.

stories.title: Framework Ventures raises $400M to invest beyond crypto: Report
stories.summary: Framework Ventures raises $400 million fourth fund as it expands into AI, robotics and energy while reportedly planning to continue crypto investments.

stories.title: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List

stories.title: AscendEX withdrawal complaints mount as ZachXBT questions reserves
stories.summary: Multiple users reported delayed AscendEX withdrawals after ZachXBT flagged potential liquidity issues and urged the exchange to explain its reserves.

stories.title: Bitcoin ETFs post June's biggest daily outflows as BTC falls below $60K
stories.summary: US Bitcoin ETFs recorded $696.3 million in outflows as Bitcoin slipped below $60,000, lifting year-to-date losses to $4.6 billion.
